calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Bill Ford, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Lonnell Howard.
Default was entered against defendant on December 28, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 16, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lonnell Howard as follows:

Defendant Lonnell Howard is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards or any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
